basic_details.job_title: District South Bastar Dantewada Chhattisgarh MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District South Bastar Dantewada Chhattisgarh has officially released the MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification on 1 May 2026 on the official website www.dantewada.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through this recruitment. Candidates aged up to 40 years who have a Graduate degree (minimum 2nd class) and meet the eligibility criteria are eligible to apply for this position. The offline application process is open from 14 May 2026 and will remain open until 13 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and submit their offline application using the dire

qualification.details: Graduate (minimum 2nd class) from a recognized university. Knowledge of Computer including MS Office. Minimum 2 years of experience in Forest Rights Act 2006 implementation in field areas. Chhattisgarh state domicile. Knowledge of tribal traditions, customs, and culture.

selection_process: Application Scrutiny Interview Merit List (50% Interview marks + 50% Graduation marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District South Bastar Dantewada Chhattisgarh MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dantewada.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
